articles.author: Tobi Opeyemi Amure, Celine Provini
articles.title: Mortgage rates erased 9 months of gains, but buyers haven’t blinked - thestreet.com
articles.description: Rates climbed back from a three-year low. Contracts are rising. Something shifted in the American homebuyer's head.
articles.content:
Key Points
  • Mortgage rates made major swings, briefly dropping below 6% before surging past 6.5% again.
  • Buyers returned despite high rates, with purchase applications up 14% year over… [+7047 chars]
